description: Multi-turn coherence: after a mentoring exchange, the user pivots to 'Learn about the volunteer process' (the 2026-07-04 staging drift repro — CONVERSATION_SESSION_STATE_DESIGN.md §2). With retrieval now on the clean current query, the reply must answer from the volunteer-process KB passage: no importing of mentoring-history details that aren't in the KB, and no drifting into generic cause-matching ('animals, the environment, seniors') like the incident. Locks the response half of Step 0; the query half is locked by index.test.js ('clean current input for substantive follow-up turns').

config.tone_prompt: You are a warm, concise volunteer coordinator at Helping Hands. Only answer from what you actually know.

kb_context: Becoming a Helping Hands volunteer: 1) Complete the volunteer application form online. 2) Attend a 30-minute phone interview with our volunteer coordinator. 3) Pass a background check (we cover the cost). 4) Attend one in-person orientation and training session. Most volunteers finish all four steps within three weeks and are then matched to a program.

conversation_history.content: Tell me about your mentoring program.

Our mentoring program pairs a caring adult with a young person who has experienced foster care. Mentors and mentees meet weekly and often share activities like board-game nights and art projects, building confidence and trust over time.
